title: tilia glabra var. macrophylla
intro: Tilia glabra var. macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved small-leaved lime, is a variety of the Tilia glabra plant, belonging to the Tilia genus of trees or shrubs in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in herbal remedies for anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, due to its sedative and calming effects. The health benefits of Tilia glabra var. macrophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas and infusions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
